derivation: Observed public DOM, style, geometry, event, and paint behavior from connected-component interaction corpora; no vendor source inspection.

required: overflow clipping to the radius curve
productEvidence: volume settings Cancel and Ok buttons
capabilities.gap: The upstream shorthand case is self-overlaid and the current Avalonia corner projection is scalar, so vertical elliptical paint is not claimed. No exact WPT combines border-radius shorthand with var()-substitution and additive calc(max()) used values; the isolated native/portable raster spike covers that composition.

The unchanged focus-visible keyboard test and all 12 pointer-focus control subtests pass exactly in native and forced-portable lanes. The WPT input adapter is intentionally bounded to the primary click and WebDriver Tab actions used by these pinned tests; broader WebDriver action sequences are not claimed.

required: currentColor inheritance into backgrounds and borders
presentation attributes below author rules in the cascade
currentColor resolution against the painted element
scene invalidation after inherited color and class changes
productEvidence: axis-scale Labels and Lines submenu chevrons
coverage: V8 Volume-more and axis-scale native scene/color/hit gates
capabilities.gap: The exact product composition is covered by product-neutral portable-scene/native-raster spikes and operated-menu gates. The current subset runner does not load SVG-root XML documents or the shared inheritance-testcommon.js harness used by svg/painting/inheritance.svg; presentation-attributes-relevant.html intentionally ranges across the complete SVG presentation-property surface, beyond the retained icon subset. These upstream documents are therefore mapped but not vendored or promoted as passing claims.

Empty decorative and literal-text in-flow pseudo boxes participate in native and portable block/flex geometry, ordering, intrinsic sizing, alignment, and paint. Absolutely positioned generated boxes resolve against positioned padding boxes or the initial containing block through the shared native/portable resolver. Hidden generated boxes retain layout participation while suppressing paint, including synchronous measurement of newly inserted fixed menus. The exact block, flex, and positioned generated-content WPTs are required and pixel-exact. WPT visibility-layout-001.xht remains a self-verifying visual test that does not compose visibility with generated content; the exact hidden composition is covered by the native/portable spike.

Outside marker paint, counters, block-child behavior, and inside-marker first-line participation now have required exact WPT plus independent native-pixel/portable-geometry and initial-font-metrics evidence. The most direct CSS2 inside-marker wrapping case remains a self-verifying visual test that the runner cannot score, so the minimal product-neutral reduction retains precise wrap and marker-only-line geometry coverage.

coverage: CSS Flexbox 1 section 9.7 Resolving Flexible Lengths
capabilities.gap: The upstream wrap reftest maps line collection and flexible main sizing, while the exact Chromium 1/64px residual distribution and 14px gap raster composition are covered by native/portable/R5 spikes because the Flexbox specification intentionally defines real-number flexible lengths rather than a browser's internal layout-unit precision. Decorative and literal-text before/after flex items are required through an exact WPT plus product-neutral native/portable geometry and raster spikes. The flex-wrap candidate still includes an unsupported floated reference construction in addition to a small flex margin/width residual; the dynamic check-layout flex test remains harness-blocked.

The required exact reftest and independent V8 iframe raster authority cover the fixed-track grid slice used by the current calendar. Fractional tracks, minmax(), named lines, dense placement, spanning, and the broader Grid specification remain outside this MVP claim.

required: anonymous cell wrappers for improper children
capabilities.gap: The exact fractional table-cell reftest, fixed-layout multi-column excess-width test, and all 11 table-model-fixup assertions are required and pass in native, forced-portable application, and direct portable-snapshot lanes. Anonymous row/cell runs preserve source order without mutating the DOM; table-column tracks, misparented internals, collapsible whitespace, single-column used-width excess, proportional fixed-length excess distribution, percentage base widths, and auto-width block children are covered. WPT css/css-tables/bounding-box-computation-1.html remains outside the claim because its exact assertions also require border-spacing and column/column-group box geometry. Colspan/rowspan and border conflict resolution remain outside this MVP slice.

productEvidence: Volume Settings selected and unselected radios
capabilities.gap: The unchanged upstream checked-state WPT is required and passes all three assertions in native and forced-portable lanes. Product-shaped native geometry/raster/event/hit gates and operated actions cover transparent overlays and styled-label activation. Broader form validation, submission, and complete select/option UI behavior remain outside this slice.
WPT testdriver pointer actions are not implemented by the subset runner.
